records.m_Talk_ENG: I've marked the coordinates where the C.O.s are clustered. Mountain road. Checkpoint Song-7.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've marked the coordinates where the C.O.s are clustered. Mountain road. Checkpoint Song-7.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've marked the coordinates where the C.O.s are clustered. Mountain road. Checkpoint Song-7.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Three transport trucks. All loaded with the requested cargo.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Three transport trucks. All loaded with the requested cargo.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Three transport trucks. All loaded with the requested cargo.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I knew it! Cutting through a Corrupted Area was insane!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I knew it! Cutting through a Corrupted Area was insane!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I knew it! Cutting through a Corrupted Area was insane!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like we had a choice. Get caught in the <color=#ffd34c>dark cloud</color> and we're dead anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like we had a choice. Get caught in the <color=#ffd34c>dark cloud</color> and we're dead anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like we had a choice. Get caught in the <color=#ffd34c>dark cloud</color> and we're dead anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Where did all these things come from?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Where did all these things come from?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Where did all these things come from?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's even in this truck that they're chasing us for?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's even in this truck that they're chasing us for?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's even in this truck that they're chasing us for?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you I'd explain later! Just keep driving!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you I'd explain later! Just keep driving!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you I'd explain later! Just keep driving!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't tell me it's this cargo?! You knew this would happen?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't tell me it's this cargo?! You knew this would happen?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't tell me it's this cargo?! You knew this would happen?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was told this was a delivery job! If I'd known we'd be swarmed by C.O.s, I'd never have signed up!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was told this was a delivery job! If I'd known we'd be swarmed by C.O.s, I'd never have signed up!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was told this was a delivery job! If I'd known we'd be swarmed by C.O.s, I'd never have signed up!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Damn it! Should've bailed when they paid too much up front
8v!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Damn it! Should've bailed when they paid too much up front
8v!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Damn it! Should've bailed when they paid too much up front
8v!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Aaagh
8v! Something just latched onto the truck! I heard claws scraping behind me!
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Aaagh
8v! Something just latched onto the truck! I heard claws scraping behind me!
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Aaagh
8v! Something just latched onto the truck! I heard claws scraping behind me!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shoot it! Do whatever you have to! Just get it off us!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shoot it! Do whatever you have to! Just get it off us!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shoot it! Do whatever you have to! Just get it off us!
